snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi()
client.folder_a_service.folder_a_service_get_direct_thread(
    ids="ids",
    tags="tags",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi()


async def main() -> None:
    await client.folder_a_service.folder_a_service_get_direct_thread(
        ids="ids",
        tags="tags",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
